config.script:
'----------------- API ----------------------------------------------- '-------- tworzy dynamicznie template raportu na podstawie pRapDef --- ' zwraca strumień przeznaczony dla ASPatora function generate_raport_stream(byref pRapDef) dim pTemplateStream : set pTemplateStream = create_asp_template(pRapDef) set generate_raport_stream = doc_.getmodule(60170).raw_asp_raport(pRapDef.params,pTemplateStream) end function function generate_raport_hli(byref pRapDef) dim pOpenHLI : set pOpenHLI = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd = CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE") set pOpenHLI.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE) = generate_raport_stream(pRapDef) set generate_raport_hli = pOpenHLI end function dim g_bAnySum : g_bAnySum = false dim g_nGroupCount : g_nGroupCount = 0 function create_asp_template(byref pRapDef) dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() '--- collect informations g_bAnySum = is_any_sum(pRapDef) g_nGroupCount = get_group_count(pRapDef) create_raport_starter1 pSO,pRapDef create_query pSO,pRapDef create_default_param pSO,pRapDef create_sections pSO,pRapDef create_body_row pSO,pRapDef create_body_header pSO,pRapDef create_body_footer pSO,pRapDef if g_nGroupCount <> 0 then create_section_support pSO end if create_raport_starter2 pSO,pRapDef create_raport_main_entry pSO,pRapDef create_raport_finisher pSO,pRapDef #ifdef _DEBUG pSO.save "c:\temp\raport_template.txt" #endif pSO.rewind set create_asp_template = pSO end function function generate_raport_hli_on_searchtype(byval nInternalID) set generate_raport_hli_on_searchtype = nothing dim idObj : idObj = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE, "nInternalID=" + CStr(nInternalID)) if idObj > 0 then dim pSearchTypeObj : set pSearchTypeObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,idObj) dim pRapDef: set pRapDef = trans_.afc.rap.new_rd(pSearchTypeObj.ResultTypeId) pRapDef.LoadSearchType pSearchTypeObj set generate_raport_hli_on_searchtype = generate_raport_hli(pRapDef) end if end function '-----------------implementation ------------------------------------------------- '-- czy jest jakieś podsumowanie --- private function is_any_sum(byref pRapDef) is_any_sum = false dim pRapDefColumn for each pRapDefColumn in pRapDef.columns if pRapDefColumn.isSum then is_any_sum = true exit function end if next end function private function get_group_count(byref pRapDef) dim nCount : nCount = 0 dim iter for iter = 1 to pRapDef.orders.count if pRapDef.orders(iter).group then nCount = nCount + 1 end if next get_group_count = nCount end function private function create_query(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function query()" + vbCrLf pSO.write "query = """ + pRapDef.create_SqlQuery().SQL + """" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf end function private function create_date_field(byref pSO, byref pRapDefColumn) pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "RXE_DATE(c_"+cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex)+")" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end function private function create_time_field(byref pSO, byref pRapDefColumn) pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "RXE_TIME(c_"+cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex)+")" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end function private function create_currency_field(byref pSO, byref pRapDefColumn) pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "RXE_QUANTITY_CVV(c_"+cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex)+","""",2)" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end function private function create_long_field(byref pSO, byref pRapDefColumn) pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "RXE_T(c_"+cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex)+")" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end function private function create_enum_field(byref pSO, byref pRapDefColumn,byref pLeavesCollection) pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "RXE_ENUM_VVC(" + cstr(pLeavesCollection(1).TypeId) + "," + pLeavesCollection(1).field.name +_ ",c_"+cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex)+")" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end function private function create_text_field(byref pSO, byref pRapDefColumn) pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf if pRapDefColumn.isLink then pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "RXE_AUTOTEXT_LINK_FORM_CCC(c_" + cstr(pRapDefColumn.TypeIdColIndex) +_ ",c_" + cstr(pRapDefColumn.IdObjColIndex) + ",c_" + cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex) + ")" + vbCrLf else pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "RXE_AUTO_TEXT(c_"+cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex) + ")" + vbCrLf end if pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end function private function create_body_header(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function body_header(byref pSection,byref pRec)" + vbCrLf #ifdef _DEBUG ' pSO.write "so.write ""


"" " + vbCrLf #endif pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf '-wygeneruj wcięcie write_indent pSO,g_nGroupCount pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf dim pRapDefColumn for each pRapDefColumn in pRapDef.columns dim pPathCracker: set pPathCracker = doc_.afc.rap.new_path_cracker(pRapDefColumn.ComposedPath) if pPathCracker.RaportType = RAPT_TEXT then pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf next pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf end function private function create_body_footer(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function body_footer(byref pSection)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf if g_bAnySum then pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf create_sum_row pSO,pRapDef,"pRapExec.body",0 pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf end if pSO.write "
LP" + vbCrLf else pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end if pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf end function private function create_body_row(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function body_row(byref pSection,byref pRec)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "if pRapExec.RecNr mod 2 = 0 then" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "else" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end if" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf '-wygeneruj wcięcie write_indent pSO,g_nGroupCount pSO.write "RXE_LP" + vbCrLf dim pRapDefColumn for each pRapDefColumn in pRapDef.columns dim pPathCracker: set pPathCracker = doc_.afc.rap.new_path_cracker(pRapDefColumn.ComposedPath) select case pPathCracker.RaportType case RAPT_CHOICE create_enum_field pSO, pRapDefColumn, pPathCracker.Leaves case RAPT_LONG,RAPT_LP 'long, LP create_long_field pSO, pRapDefColumn case RAPT_DATE 'date create_date_field pSO, pRapDefColumn case RAPT_CURRENCY,RAPT_QTY 'currency - no unit create_currency_field pSO, pRapDefColumn case RAPT_TIME create_time_field pSO, pRapDefColumn case RAPT_TEXT 'text create_text_field pSO, pRapDefColumn end select next pSO.write "" pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf end function private function create_sum_row(byref pSO,byref pRapDef,byval strSection,byval nSectionLevel) dim nCounter : nCounter = 0 dim nColSpan : nColSpan = 1 + g_nGroupCount - nSectionLevel 'bo obowiązkowe jest RXE_LP write_indent pSO,nSectionLevel dim pRapDefColumn for each pRapDefColumn in pRapDef.columns if pRapDefColumn.isSum then if nColSpan > 0 then pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end if nColSpan = 0 pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "RXE_MONEY_VAR(" + strSection + ".counter(" + cstr(nCounter) + ").result)" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf nCounter = nCounter + 1 else nColSpan = nColSpan + 1 end if next if nColSpan > 0 then pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end if end function private sub create_sections(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) dim nGroupLevel : nGroupLevel = 0 dim pOrderBy dim iter for iter = 1 to pRapDef.orders.count set pOrderBy = pRapDef.orders(iter) if pOrderBy.group then pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function section_header_" + cstr(iter) + "(byref pSection,byref pRec)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf '-wygeneruj wcięcie write_indent pSO,nGroupLevel pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "" + vbCrLf if pOrderBy.isLink then pSO.write vbTab + "RXE_AUTOTEXT_LINK_FORM_CCC(c_" + cstr(pOrderBy.TypeIdColIndex) +_ ",c_" + cstr(pOrderBy.IdObjColIndex) + ",c_" + cstr(pOrderBy.ColIndex) + ")" + vbCrLf else pSO.write vbTab + "RXE_AUTO_TEXT(c_"+cstr(pOrderBy.ColIndex) + ")" + vbCrLf end if pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "nSectionPicCounter=nSectionPicCounter+1"+ vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf '--footer-- pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function section_footer_" + cstr(iter) + "(byref pSection)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf '--- jeśli tak to je wygeneruj ------ if g_bAnySum then pSO.write "" + vbCrLf create_sum_row pSO,pRapDef,"pSection", nGroupLevel pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf end if pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf nGroupLevel = nGroupLevel + 1 end if next end sub private function bind_sections(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) dim pOrderBy dim iter for iter = 1 to pRapDef.orders.count set pOrderBy = pRapDef.orders(iter) if pOrderBy.group then pSO.write vbTab + ".add_group_section " if g_bAnySum then pSO.write "(" end if pSO.write cstr(pOrderBy.ColIndex) + ",getref(""section_header_" + cstr(iter) +_ """),getref(""section_footer_" + cstr(iter) + """)" if g_bAnySum then pSO.write ")" dim pRapDefColumn for each pRapDefColumn in pRapDef.columns if pRapDefColumn.isSum then pSO.write ".add_sumator(""c_" + cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex) + """)" end if next end if pSO.write vbCrLf end if next end function private function create_default_param(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) 'pRapDef.params pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function default_param()" + vbCrLf if pRapDef.params.upperIndex > -1 then pSO.write vbTab + "dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray()" + vbCrLf dim iter for iter = 0 to pRapDef.params.upperIndex dim pParam : set pParam = pRapDef.params.value(iter) dim strTemp if pParam.paramtype = RAPT_CHOICE then pSO.write vbTab + "dim pParamFactory" + cstr(iter) + ": set pParamFactory" + cstr(iter) + "= doc_.afc.rap.param" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "dim pParam" + cstr(iter) + ": Set pParam" + cstr(iter) + "= pParamFactory" + cstr(iter) + ".new_choice(""" +_ pParam.ParamName + """).bindexpr(""" + pParam.get_BindExpr() + """)" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "pParamFactory" + cstr(iter) + ".init_on_enum pParam" + cstr(iter) + ", TYPEID_TODO,eTODO" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "pParamArray.add pParam" + cstr(iter) + vbCrLf else strTemp = vbTab + "pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param." select case pParam.paramtype case RAPT_TEXT strTemp = strTemp + "new_text" case RAPT_DATE strTemp = strTemp + "new_date_range" case RAPT_CURRENCY strTemp = strTemp + "new_currency" case RAPT_LONG strTemp = strTemp + "new_int" end select strTemp = strTemp + "(""" + pParam.ParamName + """).bindexpr(""" +_ pParam.get_BindExpr() + """)" pSO.write strTemp + vbCrLf end if next pSO.write vbCrLf + vbTab + "set default_param = pParamArray" + vbCrLf else pSO.write vbCrLf + vbTab + "set default_param = nothing" + vbCrLf end if pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf end function private function create_raport_starter1(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "RAPORT_TITLE" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf end function private function create_raport_finisher(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf end function private function create_raport_main_entry(byref pSO,byref pRapDef) pSO.write "



" + vbCrLf pSO.write "Kryteria selekcji:
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "dim pRapExec : set pRapExec = rapeng_.new_engine()" + vbCrLf pSO.write "with pRapExec" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + ".add_body_ex " if g_bAnySum then pSO.write "(" end if pSO.write "getref(""body_header""),getref(""body_footer""),getref(""body_row"")" if g_bAnySum then pSO.write ")" dim pRapDefColumn for each pRapDefColumn in pRapDef.columns if pRapDefColumn.isSum then pSO.write ".add_sumator(""c_" + cstr(pRapDefColumn.ColIndex) + """)" end if next end if pSO.write vbCrLf bind_sections pSO,pRapDef pSO.write "if .prepare(""RAPORT_TITLE"",rapeng_.get_raport_param(),rapeng_.get_raport_param(),query()) then" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "rapeng_.write_actual_param so,rapeng_.get_raport_param()" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "if not .perform then" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "so.write ""

Brak danych spełniających podane kryteria

""" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "end if" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<%" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end if" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end with" + vbCrLf pSO.write "%>" + vbCrLf end function private function create_section_support(byref pSO) pSO.write "<%dim nSectionPicCounter : nSectionPicCounter = 10000000%>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function section_hideshow_hli(byref pHLI)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "doc_.afc.formsection.section_hideshow page_, pHLI.prop(100)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf end function private function write_indent(byref pSO,byval nLevel) do while nLevel > 0 pSO.write vbTab + " " + vbCrLf nLevel = nLevel - 1 loop end function
